body: Hi, I ordered the Arsenal home shirt last Tuesday (order #10472) and haven't heard anything. Has it shipped yet?
where's my order?? been a few days
notes: No order number — reply should ask for order #/email; still auto_send.

body: Tracking says my parcel was delivered yesterday but there's nothing here. Order #10510.
notes: Send the 'check around / confirm address' reply; opening a claim = escalate.

body: My order has been stuck 'in transit' for two weeks and I need it for the match Saturday. Order #10488. I want a refund if it's not here by then.
notes: Refund demand + deadline -> escalate, do not promise.

body: Do your shirts come up small? I'm normally a medium.
notes: Quotes sizing guidance -> draft until sizing policy confirmed.

body: Is the Liverpool 23/24 third kit still in stock in XL?
notes: Answerable from live Shopify inventory, no policy quoted.

body: I just ordered (#10533) but put the wrong flat number. Can you change it to 14B before it ships?
notes: Pre-fulfilment address change, no refund -> can action + confirm.

body: Please cancel order #10540 and refund me, I ordered by mistake.
notes: Cancellation triggering a refund -> money gated.

body: How do I return a shirt? It doesn't fit and I'd like the next size up. Order #10501.
notes: Quotes returns window/conditions -> draft until returns policy confirmed.

body: I want a full refund for order #10477, the quality isn't what I expected.
notes: Money — always gated; ack draft + recommendation to approver.

body: My shirt arrived with a hole in the sleeve and the print is peeling. Order #10463. Really disappointed.
notes: Replacement (Tarlu) / refund -> gated; request photo, route resolution.

body: You sent me the wrong team! I ordered Spurs and got Chelsea.
notes: Wrong item -> replacement/refund gated. (TikTok adapter stubbed.)

body: This is the third time I've emailed with no reply. Absolutely shocking service. I'll be doing a chargeback and leaving reviews everywhere.
notes: Angry + chargeback threat -> immediate Slack escalation, never auto-send.

body: I've contacted my solicitor about my missing £180 order. Expect to hear from them.
notes: Legal threat + large order -> escalate, never admit liability.
